subject: Bronzor, a flat disc-shaped bronze Pokemon in a misty ancient ruin setting
description: A flat, circular bronze-toned Pokemon with two large round eye-markings floats or rests in a misty, overgrown ruin environment. The creature resembles an ancient bronze mirror or disc, with a symmetrical face-like pattern. The background is foggy and grey-green with stone ruins or mossy surfaces visible. The atmosphere is quiet and ancient, with soft diffuse light filtering through mist. The disc form and ruin setting reinforce the flavor-text's reference to mysterious ancient origins.
foreground: flat circular bronze disc Pokemon with eye markings, hovering
background: misty ancient ruins with mossy stone
